notices.subject: Notice contains form with INTERNAL
notices.noticeContent: This notice includes a structured HTML form embedded within a styled paragraph. It demonstrates the use of various inline formatting techniques—such as colored text, background highlights, bold and italic emphasis, underlines, strikethroughs, and text alignment (left, center, right). Simulated numbered and bullet lists are presented using styled <span> blocks, and internal and external hyperlinks are included for navigation. The layout serves as a versatile template for presenting formatted content within a notice or announcement.

notices.subject: Notice contains form with HMTL
notices.noticeContent: This notice includes a structured HTML form embedded within a styled paragraph. It demonstrates the use of various inline formatting techniques—such as colored text, background highlights, bold and italic emphasis, underlines, strikethroughs, and text alignment (left, center, right). Simulated numbered and bullet lists are presented using styled <span> blocks, and internal and external hyperlinks are included for navigation. The layout serves as a versatile template for presenting formatted content within a notice or announcement.
